name: White Chocolate Chip Cookies W/Macadamias
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the butter, sugars, egg, and vanilla until fluffy. Scrape down the sides of the bowl once.
2. Add the flour, baking soda, and salt and mix until just combined. Do not over mix.
3. Stir in the white chocolate chunks and macadamia nuts.
4. Mound the dough by 1/3 cupfuls onto a lightly greased cookie sheet, spacing about 2 inches apart.
5. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven until lightly browned around the edges, about 15 minutes.
6. Cool on the cookie sheet for 3 minutes, then remove to racks and cool completely.
7. Store in an air-tight container. (These cookies can be prepared ahead of time. They can be stored at room temperature up to 4 days or frozen for 3 weeks.)
